asset_name: BPC-157 Human Interstitial Cystitis Pilot Evidence Lead
status: HUMAN PUBLICATION IDENTIFIED — METHODOLOGICAL AND PRIMARY-SOURCE REVIEW PENDING

study.publication_title: Effect of BPC-157 on Symptoms in Patients with Interstitial Cystitis: A Pilot Study
study.journal: Alternative Therapies in Health and Medicine

evidence_summary: A pilot human publication has been identified. It is preserved as a human evidence lead, not as proof of established efficacy.
limitations: Pilot evidence cannot establish broad efficacy or safety.
Study design, sample size, controls and full adverse-event reporting require direct appraisal.
